title: hyoscyamus niger var. pallidus
intro: Hyoscyamus niger var. pallidus, also known as a variety of the black henbane plant, is a flowering plant belonging to the nightshade family. It contains tropane alkaloids, which possess medicinal properties, including sedative, antispasmodic, and anticholinergic effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. Hyoscyamus niger var. pallidus is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and teas, although it should be used with caution due to its potential side effects and toxicity.
